initial_candidates.sql:
WITH city_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) AS rn
    FROM cities
    WHERE country_code_2 = 'cn'
      AND insert_date BETWEEN '2021-07-01' AND '2021-07-31'
),
date_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        rn,
        julianday(insert_date) - rn AS grp
    FROM city_dates
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        grp,
        MIN(insert_date) AS start_date,
        MAX(insert_date) AS end_date,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length,
        MIN(city_name) AS city_name  -- arbitrary pick since we need one city per streak
    FROM date_groups
    GROUP BY grp
),
min_max_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        streak_length,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        city_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length ASC) AS rn_asc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length DESC) AS rn_desc
    FROM streaks
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    UPPER(LEFT(city_name, 1)) || LOWER(SUBSTR(city_name, 2)) AS city_name,
    insert_date
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ds.city_name,
        ds.insert_date
    FROM min_max_streaks mms
    JOIN date_groups ds ON mms.grp = ds.grp
    WHERE mms.rn_asc = 1 OR mms.rn_desc = 1
    ORDER BY ds.insert_date
) 
ORDER BY insert_date;

WITH cn_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date
    FROM cities
    WHERE country_code_2 = 'cn'
      AND insert_date BETWEEN '2021-07-01' AND '2021-07-31'
),
dated_list AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) AS rn,
        DATE(insert_date, '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) || ' days') AS grp
    FROM cn_cities
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        grp,
        MIN(insert_date) AS start_date,
        MAX(insert_date) AS end_date,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length,
        GROUP_CONCAT(city_name || ':' || insert_date ORDER BY insert_date) AS city_dates
    FROM dated_list
    GROUP BY grp
),
min_max_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        streak_length,
        city_dates,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length ASC) AS min_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length DESC) AS max_rank
    FROM streaks
),
final_result AS (
    SELECT 
        city_dates,
        streak_length
    FROM min_max_streaks
    WHERE min_rank = 1 OR max_rank = 1
),
split_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(city_dates, 1, INSTR(city_dates, ':') - 1) AS city_name,
        SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ':') + 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ':') + 1), ',') - 1) AS date_part,
        1 AS streak_type
    FROM final_result
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ',') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ',') + 1), ':') - 1) AS city_name,
        SUBSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ',') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ',') + 1), ':') + 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ',') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(city_dates, INSTR(city_dates, ',') + 1), ':') + 1), ',') - 1) AS date_part,
        1 AS streak_type
    FROM final_result
    WHERE streak_length > 1
)
SELECT 
    date_part AS insert_date,
    UPPER(SUBSTR(city_name, 1, 1)) || LOWER(SUBSTR(city_name, 2)) AS city_name
FROM split_dates
WHERE date_part IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY insert_date;

WITH cn_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        LOWER(LEFT(city_name, 1)) || SUBSTR(city_name, 2) AS city_name_lower,
        city_name,
        insert_date
    FROM cities
    WHERE country_code_2 = 'cn'
      AND insert_date BETWEEN '2021-07-01' AND '2021-07-31'
),
capitalized_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        UPPER(LEFT(city_name, 1)) || SUBSTR(city_name, 2) AS city_name_cap
    FROM cn_cities
),
date_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name_cap,
        insert_date,
        julianday(insert_date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) AS grp
    FROM capitalized_cities
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        grp,
        MIN(insert_date) AS streak_start,
        MAX(insert_date) AS streak_end,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length,
        MIN(insert_date) AS min_date_in_streak,
        MAX(insert_date) AS max_date_in_streak
    FROM date_groups
    GROUP BY grp
),
ranked_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        streak_start,
        streak_end,
        streak_length,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length ASC) AS rank_short,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length DESC) AS rank_long
    FROM streaks
),
shortest_streak AS (
    SELECT streak_start, streak_end
    FROM ranked_streaks
    WHERE rank_short = 1
),
longest_streak AS (
    SELECT streak_start, streak_end
    FROM ranked_streaks
    WHERE rank_long = 1
),
final_shortest AS (
    SELECT 
        s.insert_date,
        s.city_name_cap
    FROM capitalized_cities s
    JOIN shortest_streak sh ON s.insert_date BETWEEN sh.streak_start AND sh.streak_end
),
final_longest AS (
    SELECT 
        s.insert_date,
        s.city_name_cap
    FROM capitalized_cities s
    JOIN longest_streak lo ON s.insert_date BETWEEN lo.streak_start AND lo.streak_end
)
SELECT insert_date, city_name_cap AS city_name
FROM final_shortest
UNION ALL
SELECT insert_date, city_name_cap AS city_name
FROM final_longest
ORDER BY insert_date;

WITH cn_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        LOWER(LEFT(city_name, 1)) || SUBSTR(city_name, 2) AS city_name,
        insert_date
    FROM cities
    WHERE country_code_2 = 'cn'
      AND insert_date BETWEEN '2021-07-01' AND '2021-07-31'
),
date_series AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        DATE(insert_date) AS dt,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) AS rn,
        DATE(insert_date, '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) || ' days') AS grp
    FROM cn_cities
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        grp,
        MIN(insert_date) AS streak_start,
        MAX(insert_date) AS streak_end,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM date_series
    GROUP BY city_name, grp
),
all_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        streak_start,
        streak_end,
        streak_length,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length ASC, streak_start ASC) AS rn_shortest,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length DESC, streak_start ASC) AS rn_longest
    FROM streaks
),
shortest_streak_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        s.streak_start,
        s.streak_end,
        s.streak_length
    FROM all_streaks s
    WHERE s.rn_shortest = 1
),
longest_streak_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        s.streak_start,
        s.streak_end,
        s.streak_length
    FROM all_streaks s
    WHERE s.rn_longest = 1
),
shortest_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(ds.insert_date) AS date,
        ds.city_name
    FROM date_series ds
    JOIN shortest_streak_dates ssd 
        ON ds.grp = ssd.streak_start
),
longest_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE(ds.insert_date) AS date,
        ds.city_name
    FROM date_series ds
    JOIN longest_streak_dates lsd 
        ON ds.grp = lsd.streak_start
)
SELECT 
    date,
    city_name
FROM shortest_dates
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    date,
    city_name
FROM longest_dates
ORDER BY date;

WITH cn_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        c.city_name,
        c.insert_date,
        LOWER(SUBSTR(c.city_name, 1, 1)) || SUBSTR(c.city_name, 2) AS city_name_normalized
    FROM cities c
    JOIN cities_countries cc ON c.country_code_2 = cc.country_code_2
    WHERE c.country_code_2 = 'cn'
      AND c.insert_date BETWEEN '2021-07-01' AND '2021-07-31'
),
capitalized_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        UPPER(SUBSTR(city_name, 1, 1)) || SUBSTR(city_name, 2) AS city_name_capitalized
    FROM cn_cities
),
date_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name_capitalized AS city_name,
        insert_date,
        julianday(insert_date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) AS grp
    FROM capitalized_cities
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        MIN(insert_date) AS streak_start,
        MAX(insert_date) AS streak_end,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM date_groups
    GROUP BY grp, city_name
),
all_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        streak_start,
        streak_end,
        streak_length,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length ASC, streak_start ASC) AS rn_shortest,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length DESC, streak_start ASC) AS rn_longest
    FROM streaks
),
shortest_streak AS (
    SELECT streak_start, streak_end
    FROM all_streaks
    WHERE rn_shortest = 1
),
longest_streak AS (
    SELECT streak_start, streak_end
    FROM all_streaks
    WHERE rn_longest = 1
),
shortest_dates AS (
    SELECT cs.city_name, cs.insert_date
    FROM capitalized_cities cs
    JOIN shortest_streak ss ON cs.insert_date BETWEEN ss.streak_start AND ss.streak_end
),
longest_dates AS (
    SELECT cs.city_name, cs.insert_date
    FROM capitalized_cities cs
    JOIN longest_streak ls ON cs.insert_date BETWEEN ls.streak_start AND ls.streak_end
)
SELECT insert_date AS date, city_name
FROM shortest_dates
UNION ALL
SELECT insert_date AS date, city_name
FROM longest_dates
ORDER BY date;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH cn_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        c.city_name,
        c.insert_date,
        LOWER(SUBSTR(c.city_name, 1, 1)) || SUBSTR(c.city_name, 2) AS city_name_normalized
    FROM cities c
    JOIN cities_countries cc ON c.country_code_2 = cc.country_code_2
    WHERE c.country_code_2 = 'cn'
      AND c.insert_date BETWEEN '2021-07-01' AND '2021-07-31'
),
capitalized_cities AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        insert_date,
        UPPER(SUBSTR(city_name, 1, 1)) || SUBSTR(city_name, 2) AS city_name_capitalized
    FROM cn_cities
),
date_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name_capitalized AS city_name,
        insert_date,
        julianday(insert_date) - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY insert_date) AS grp
    FROM capitalized_cities
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        MIN(insert_date) AS streak_start,
        MAX(insert_date) AS streak_end,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM date_groups
    GROUP BY grp, city_name
),
all_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        city_name,
        streak_start,
        streak_end,
        streak_length,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length ASC, streak_start ASC) AS rn_shortest,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY streak_length DESC, streak_start ASC) AS rn_longest
    FROM streaks
),
shortest_streak AS (
    SELECT streak_start, streak_end
    FROM all_streaks
    WHERE rn_shortest = 1
),
longest_streak AS (
    SELECT streak_start, streak_end
    FROM all_streaks
    WHERE rn_longest = 1
),
shortest_dates AS (
    SELECT cs.city_name, cs.insert_date
    FROM capitalized_cities cs
    JOIN shortest_streak ss ON cs.insert_date BETWEEN ss.streak_start AND ss.streak_end
),
longest_dates AS (
    SELECT cs.city_name, cs.insert_date
    FROM capitalized_cities cs
    JOIN longest_streak ls ON cs.insert_date BETWEEN ls.streak_start AND ls.streak_end
)
SELECT insert_date AS date, city_name
FROM shortest_dates
UNION ALL
SELECT insert_date AS date, city_name
FROM longest_dates
ORDER BY date;
